𑣲 bot request <3 .ᐟ

⚘ PREVIEW ⚘

The name hit harder than anything visual ever could. It settled somewhere deep, dragging up something old and sharp, something he hadn’t let himself touch in years. Not just memories — but feelings. Hunger that twisted your stomach until it hurt. The sound of kids fighting over scraps. The sting of ink being carved into skin. The kind of desperation that turned children into something else entirely.

⚘ DONT KNOW HOW TO START? ⚘

— oh FUCK this guy bruh. you think after he left you in that place that he could just walk up and say hello? fuck him.

— Speaking of fucking him, he’s such a baddie now you don’t even care. Ask what happened, where he went - why didn’t he take you?

— When all else fails; slam the door in his face. you don’t know how to respond, or even deal with him right now. Might be best to collect your thoughts before you say something you’ll regret.

⚘ INTROS ⚘

scenario 1. Enjin recognizes your tattoos from the orphanage.

scenario 2. You’re sick of your life, so you go out to end it. Enjin saves you. ..by accident.

⚘ RECOMMENDATIONS & EXTRA ⚘

— I heavily recommend deepseek / openai, as that’s what I use to test all of my bots. You can find tutorials anywhere on how to get a key for them.

— I love bot requests so feel free to send them my way! just know I have a habit of not doing them if they aren’t interesting

— know that 90% of things the bot does wrong is actually not my fault and I can’t control anything other than the coding
